name: Cubbit
description: Italian geo-distributed S3-compatible object storage platform with built-in multi-region redundancy.

seo.title: Cubbit — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Cubbit: Italian geo-distributed S3-compatible object storage platform with built-in multi-region redundancy.

when_to_use: S3-compatible geo-distributed object storage with EU residency
Multi-region redundancy without manual bucket replication
GDPR-compliant media storage for European teams
Replacing AWS S3 with sovereign Italian cloud storage
Distributed backup target with built-in multi-site durability

pros: Geo-distributed storage across EU by default
S3-compatible API drops into existing tools
Flat per-GB pricing, no surprise line items
cons: Smaller network means fewer regions than AWS
Throughput variable under heavy concurrent load
Limited track record for multi-PB deployments
Customer support hours skewed to CET
review.verdict: Cheaper, EU-sovereign S3 alternative with no egress — good fit if AWS egress bills sting or GDPR looms.
review.best_for: European teams wanting S3-compatible storage with data sovereignty and predictable costs.
review.not_for: Global enterprises needing 20+ regions and hyperscaler SLAs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
